description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly white exterior. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the main living spaces. The structure includes multiple rooms, visible through the open plan and interior partitions, with some areas featuring wood accents and built-in shelving. A small balcony or terrace is present, and a single palm tree is positioned adjacent to the building, suggesting a warm climate. The house appears to have a garage or covered parking area on one side, and the main entryway is subtly integrated into the facade. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on open, functional spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, white walls, and wood accents, featuring a garage and a palm tree nearby. The design is minimalist and open, with a focus on natural light and clean lines.
description_view_0: This view shows the front facade with expansive glass windows, the garage area, and the adjacent palm tree.
description_view_1: From this angle, the entryway and a small balcony or terrace are visible, along with the side of the house and the palm tree.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the large windows, interior shelving, and the open layout of the rooms.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals more of the interior partitions, wood accents, and the back side of the house with fewer windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryway with a flush door, no steps, and an integrated overhang; adjacent to a garage and framed by clean lines.
